title: Trailer Exp. Pack
description: Resource Pack used in Axl0's Trainer Experience modpack
body:
# Makes your title screen look more like the Trailers!
**THIS ISNT A PACK SIMILAR TO BARE BONES. IT ONLY AFFECTS THE TITLE SCREEN**

This pack is used in [Axl0's Trailer Experience](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-exp/), this pack allows you to get a better looking title screen!

![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33fb261a901829a80b1cc74a4877f63ee6262b76.png)
